title: Supply Chain Manager - Maersk India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Maersk India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Maersk India family as a Supply Chain Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Maersk India:
Maersk India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maersk India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
